$comment: D-CSUBSET-VLA C1b CRITICAL-1 runtime guard: a LEAF VLA function whose 26 live locals SPILL around the runtime `sub sp,<size>`. Proves the spill reload/store fixed-frame refs address off the frame pointer, not the moved SP — an SP-based spill would read garbage below the VLA or clobber the array (either flips the exit code). The `release` arm (Mem2Reg promotes the locals to SSA vregs, then the allocator spills them) is the arm that most exercises the spill path; the arm64 leg proves it under the real extended-register SUB-sp on hardware-accurate qemu. exitCode 42 = sum(1..26)=351 + a[5]=5 - 314.
